full_text:
Jia Hua 賈華
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jia Hua (賈華). Officer of Wu. Guarded Sun Quan at the battle of Hefei. Jia Hua was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
